title: lactuca sibirica
intro: Lactuca sibirica, also known as Far Eastern prickly lettuce, is a plant species in the dandelion family. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lactuca sibirica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lactuca sibirica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
